items.situation: two students swapping music recommendations because one is bored of the same pop singers

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, can you suggest some new music? I'm tired of the same pop singers everyone plays.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, definitely! Try indie folk. There's a band called Wildwood Echo that's been on repeat for me.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wildwood Echo? Never heard of them. What's their sound like?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Acoustic, soft harmonies, mellow vibes. Their new album just dropped last Friday.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That sounds great. Where can I stream it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Any major app. I'll text you the playlist tonight.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yes please! I'll listen on my walk tomorrow.

questions.stem: What does the man recommend the woman listen to?

options.A: A new indie folk album from Wildwood Echo
options.B: A jazz playlist his friend just made
options.C: Classical music for studying late at night
options.D: Live recordings from a campus concert series

questions.explanation: 男生明确推荐Wildwood Echo的indie folk新专辑。B是凭空捏造的细节。C完全没在对话中出现。D借用了对话词汇但不相关。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do tonight?

options.A: Download the Wildwood Echo album for the woman
options.B: Walk the woman to her morning class
options.C: Send the woman a playlist by text message
options.D: Buy concert tickets for the new album release

questions.explanation: 男生说今晚会发短信给女生分享歌单，可推知他会发短信。A过度推论。B是话题相关但与对话无关。D是无关延伸。

items.situation: two friends discussing a movie one just saw — good twists but too long

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, did you finally watch 'The Quiet Hour' last weekend? You said you were planning to.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I did! The twists honestly blew me away. There's one near the end I never saw coming.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? My roommate said the same thing. So you'd recommend it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: With one big warning. It runs almost three hours. I started fidgeting around the two-hour mark.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yikes, three hours? I was thinking of seeing it tomorrow night.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Just make sure you've got snacks and a comfortable seat. And maybe skip the giant soda.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: Which movie to watch this coming weekend
options.B: A movie one of them recently saw and enjoyed
options.C: A late-night snack recommendation for the cinema
options.D: How to find comfortable seating at the local theater

questions.explanation: 对话的核心是男生上周末看的电影和给女生的建议。A颠倒了情景。C只是男生最后一句的细节。D借用了对话中的'舒适座位'做表面陷阱。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the woman's plans?

options.A: She has decided to skip the movie entirely
options.B: She will read the book the movie is based on
options.C: She will avoid going to any long movies in the future
options.D: She intends to watch the same movie tomorrow night

questions.explanation: 女生说她考虑明晚去看，并听了男生关于零食和座位的建议，因此可推知她仍打算去看。A与对话相反。B完全没提到。C过度概括。

items.situation: two students planning what cheese and food to buy for a dinner party

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Okay, what cheese should we grab for Saturday's dinner? Marco said he'd bring wine, but we need everything else.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely a soft brie. Maybe a sharp cheddar too — people always reach for both.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: And crackers?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Crackers, fresh grapes, and some olives if the deli has the kalamatas. Skip nuts — Sara has the allergy.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Right, good call. Should we get one block or two?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Two blocks for sure. Eight guests will tear through one in twenty minutes.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Got it. I'll handle the cheese run after class.

questions.stem: What does the man suggest they avoid buying?

options.A: The kalamata olives at the deli counter
options.B: Both brie and sharp cheddar varieties
options.C: Any nuts because of a guest's allergy
options.D: Crackers because they often go stale fast

questions.explanation: 男生明确说skip nuts因为Sara过敏。A是男生推荐买的。B也是男生推荐的。D凭空捏造的理由。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do after class?

options.A: Stop at the store to pick up the cheese and snacks
options.B: Call Sara to confirm her food allergies
options.C: Cancel the dinner because of allergy concerns
options.D: Ask Marco to bring extra wine bottles

questions.explanation: 女生最后说会handle the cheese run after class，所以会去商店买。B是话题相关但她没说要打电话。C完全相反。D是无关延伸。

items.situation: a student asking a shop about repairing a cracked phone screen

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, my phone screen cracked yesterday when I dropped it on the sidewalk. Can someone here fix it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, we do screen replacements. Is the phone still turning on?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: It is, and the touch still works. Just lots of cracks across the surface.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good. For your model, the replacement runs about sixty-five dollars and takes around two hours.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Two hours? I have class at three.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Then I'd suggest dropping it off in the morning. We open at eight, and your phone will be ready before your class.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll come back tomorrow at eight sharp.

questions.stem: What does the man tell the woman about the repair?

options.A: The phone needs new internal components
options.B: The repair will be free with student ID
options.C: The shop closes early on weekends only
options.D: The repair takes about two hours to complete

questions.explanation: 男生明确说大约需要两小时。A是凭空捏造的细节——只换屏幕。B完全没提。C是无关信息。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do tomorrow morning?

options.A: Take her phone to a different repair shop
options.B: Bring her phone to the shop when it opens at eight
options.C: Buy a brand-new phone instead of fixing this one
options.D: Skip her three o'clock class entirely

questions.explanation: 女生最后说明天八点回来，所以会在开门时把手机送过来。A是相反选择。C她已决定修不是换。D无关延伸。

items.situation: two friends sharing cooking tips while grocery shopping

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wait, do you always pick the bunched broccoli over the pre-cut florets? I usually just grab the bag.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, the bunched ones last way longer in the fridge. Pre-cut florets start wilting in three days.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Huh. I've definitely had to toss a half-eaten bag.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Same with herbs. Buy them as a whole bunch, wrap them in a damp paper towel, and they'll stay fresh for a week.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Damp paper towel? I've been throwing herbs in a plastic bag and watching them go slimy.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Try it next time. Honestly changed my cooking.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm definitely going to test that tonight.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: Practical tips for keeping produce fresh longer
options.B: The best supermarket to shop at near campus
options.C: A recipe one of them wants to try tonight
options.D: The cost of broccoli compared to other vegetables

questions.explanation: 对话核心是男生分享如何让蔬菜和香草保鲜更久。B完全没提。C借用了'tonight'做表面陷阱但跑题。D只是表层细节。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do tonight?

options.A: Throw out the herbs she bought last week
options.B: Switch to buying only canned vegetables in the future
options.C: Try wrapping her fresh herbs in a damp paper towel
options.D: Cook the broccoli before it has a chance to wilt

questions.explanation: 女生最后说今晚要试一下，指的是男生教的湿纸巾包香草的方法。A借用了她以前的做法。B过度推论。D是话题相关但不是她说要做的。
